reasoning: The control CP-9 (2) focuses on ensuring that system backups are not only configured but also tested for restoration using sampling. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that etcd, which stores cluster state, has a backup configured and that these backups are regularly tested for restoration. Additionally, for applications running in the cluster, it's important to have a defined backup strategy for critical workloads (e.g., StatefulSets) and to test the restoration process to ensure data integrity and availability.
title: System Backup | Test Restoration Using Sampling
